title: [Gene] RSI proposal deduplication
description: Gene registry match: applying 'gene_optimize_rsi_proposal_dedup' (success_rate=0%) to address 'repeated_mistake' in 'infrastructure_ops' tasks.

implementation.changes:
Add deduplication check to synthesizer.generate_proposals_heuristic():
  1. Load events.jsonl from data/events.jsonl
  2. For each new proposal, check if a similar proposal (same category+issue) was generated in the last 8 cycles
  3. If match found, skip or mark as 'duplicate' with reference to prior proposal
  4. Log dedup decisions to events.jsonl

validation_criteria: Synthesizer generates fewer duplicate proposals in consecutive runs
No same category+issue appears twice in a single run
expected_improvement: Reduce duplicate proposal generation by checking events.jsonl history
